prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Youth Investment Fund Phase 2 is applicable to England as it is overseen by the Department for Digital, Culture, Media and Sport (DCMS), which primarily operates within England. Thus, the findings of the report pertain to initiatives specifically designed for youth in England.
